feat.name: Call Draconic Ally
feat.text: Either by beseeching a dragon or bending it to your will, you conjure a mighty creature to assist you. Once per day while you are Channeling Draconic Essence, you can cast *summon dragon* as an innate spell with a tradition matching your draconic exemplar, heightened to half your level rounded up.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
